bugs.summary: The patch stores tracer interruption reasons in plain error fields that Stop writes concurrently with GetResult reads.
bugs.impact: Trace timeout/cancel paths can race RPC result collection across multiple native tracers, producing Go race detector failures and unsafe concurrent access to tracer state.
acceptableFixes: Store the interruption reason using atomic.Pointer[error] or equivalent synchronization and load it in GetResult.
Do not read/write tracer reason fields unsynchronized across Stop and GetResult goroutines.

mustAvoidClaims: Using upstream PR titles, issue numbers, commit messages, or git history as evidence.
Relying on private repro.sh, gold-key.draft.json, or reference-fix.patch.
Claiming unrelated broad rewrites outside the proposed patch are required.

difficulty.rationale: The defect spans multiple tracer implementations and only appears under concurrent Stop/GetResult race testing.

candidateVisible: sanitized go-ethereum workspace at pinned revision
candidateForbidden: judge prompts, answer keys, run artifacts, and A/B mappings
upstream PR/issue text or commit message

approvedBy: source-only reverse fixture with RED/GREEN repro
approval.notes: Pilot OSS-derived holdout task; provider review pending before promotion to primary release gate.
